name: agent-memory-cowork
description: Codex-facing host-project adapter for Markdown-first Agent Memory skills, commands, diagnostics, and reports. Claude hooks are packaged separately in the Claude manifest.

interface.shortDescription: Capture agent sessions into Markdown memory.
interface.longDescription: Captures Claude/Cowork and Codex-adjacent runtime events as private Markdown-first session memory, then prepares reviewed summaries for RAG, LightRAG, and GraphRAG exports.
